description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Compiler Tests that runs every Friday at 7AM UTC and allows manual dispatch. The workflow consists of two jobs: all-compilers and latest-compilers-all-gem5-builds. The all-compilers job runs on a self-hosted Linux environment with various images and options, checks out the develop branch, and compiles gem5 with scons. The latest-compilers-all-gem5-builds job tests the two latest GCC and Clang compilers against all gem5 compilations in a similar environment.
